Container.Name: wakeword-training
Container.Overview: Train custom wake word models for openwakeword using synthetic speech generation and GPU-accelerated training. Produces .onnx and .tflite models for use with Home Assistant voice pipelines.

Config.Name: Wake Word
Config.Description: The wake word phrase to train, e.g. 'hey nanoclaw'

Config.Name: Training Samples
Config.Description: Number of positive training samples to generate

Config.Name: Layer Size
Config.Description: Model layer dimension (larger = more capable but slower)

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: Which GPU(s) to use. 'all' or a specific GPU UUID.

Config.Name: Data Cache
Config.Description: Cached datasets and intermediate training data (~12GB first run)

Config.Name: Model Output
Config.Description: Where the trained .onnx and .tflite models are written
